name: MILF's Day Off: Swap App
description:
Olivia is a perfect example of a mature housewife, but recently, she's been wanting a bit more from life. And so she did something bold, and asked you if you're interested in her body.



You've always known Olivia as the lovable, gentle, thirst-inducing neighbor's wife, but she hasn't been feeling so hot recently. Mid-life crisis has her in desperate need of a getaway, just a short break away from the mom life. That's when she turned to the Swap App, a handy dandy matchmaking service, but for body swaps instead of dating; and wouldn't you know? In hver hour of need, she found out her neighbor just so happened to have an account there too.

So, will you give this 42-year-old mom bod a shot?



Hey Everyone,

This week's (real) bot is an anonymous request for a good ol' MILF body swap. Specifically a "body swap with your mother, or maybe the neighbor's wife."

I wanted this to be a bigger scenario, with multiple neighborhood moms for you to swap with, but ended up down-scaling it to just Olivia because I felt it was too much for a single bot. Maybe if there's interest in older women body switching I'll bring those scrapped scenarios back.

If you want to submit your own request, here you go: Request Box

And yes, I know this has absolutely nothing to do with the "springfever" theme, but I don't care, I already missed the Valentine's Day's badge, I'm not losing another one.
creator: Frinky
